nodes.label: Update IELTS Materials Workflow
nodes.rationale: SOP for scraping fresh practice questions and examiner tips from trusted IELTS sources into each lesson's Practice & Resources section. Checks robots.txt per source and skips disallowed domains; failed sources are skipped with a warning, leaving existing materials untouched. Since the Astro migration (July 2026), targets src/content/lesson-bodies/<slug>.html fragments and changes go live on push via GitHub Actions.

nodes.label: scrape_ielts_materials.py
nodes.rationale: Deterministic tool (requests + beautifulsoup4) that fetches source URLs with a browser User-Agent, extracts tips/practice questions, and rebuilds the Practice & Resources card section in each lesson fragment.

nodes.label: LESSON_SOURCES Config
nodes.rationale: Dict at the top of scrape_ielts_materials.py mapping each lesson fragment to its source URLs; the single place to edit when a source URL moves or a new lesson is added.

nodes.label: MATERIALS Comment Markers
nodes.rationale: <!-- MATERIALS --> ... <!-- /MATERIALS --> markers in each lesson fragment delimit the injected region, so scraped content can be replaced idempotently without touching hand-written lesson content; also the manual-edit escape hatch when a source is blocked.

nodes.label: IELTS Liz (source site)
nodes.rationale: Trusted source for examiner tips across Reading, Writing T1/T2, Speaking P1-P3, Listening and Vocabulary lessons.

nodes.label: IELTS Up (source site)
nodes.rationale: Trusted source for practice questions across all lesson pages.

edges.source_location: 'Edit the LESSON_SOURCES dict at the top of tools/scrape_ielts_materials.py'
'Replaces the content between <!-- MATERIALS --> and <!-- /MATERIALS --> markers'
table rows Writing T1 / Writing T2 target src/content/lesson-bodies fragments; exact fragment files not named
